issues.description: Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but card text specifies '[Opponent's Turn] When this Character is K.O.'d, give up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards −2000 power during this turn.' The −2000 power effect occurs during opponent's turn (when this card is KO'd on opponent's turn), so duration should be 'DuringOpponentTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'.

Target scope 'ChooseOpponentCharacter' should include Leader as valid option. Card text says 'give up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards', so target should allow selection of either Leader OR Character, not just Character.
